message.entry: 履歴はデスクトップなしでは利用できません。
The last line from the history cannot be used in a script because it was an error.
Line {0} from the history cannot be used in a script because it was an error.
Specified line {0} cannot be used because there are only {1} lines in the history.
履歴に変数 ''{0}'' が見つかりません。
